sample_posts.text: https://x.com/slow/status/2077175619859943494

tweet.text:
Wix at 1x ARR is not a SaaS bloodbath. 

It is a reckoning for businesses that were always just sales and marketing operations dressed up as software.

1. The client-server to SaaS shift was more disruptive than anything AI is doing to software right now. This is incremental. The market is finally pricing it that way.

2. SaaS was never that hard to spin up. When the moat is a sales team and a logo, the multiple compresses. That is not a surprise, that is gravity.

3. The companies that survive this are the ones with complex customer relationships and data sets that cannot be recreated. Wix do

Fed rate hike expectations surge on inflation concerns –
Link
Fed Governor Christopher Waller said the FOMC may need to raise rates in the near term if core inflation stays elevated. Markets now price about a 50% chance of a July hike, up from ≈10% days ago. Bitcoin is down 2%+ to around $62,380, while U.S. two-year Treasury yields rose to 4.29%.
Matters because:
Higher-for-longer rates and renewed hike odds add pressure to BTC and the broader risk backdrop.

sample_posts.text:
Kalshi launches markets for GPU compute
https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-14/kalshi-ramps-up-effort-to-build-markets-for-ai-computing-power

Galaxy Research: Inference Capital Markets
> A new onchain financial layer is emerging around AI inference, using crypto to tokenize compute access, finance GPU infrastructure, and create markets for AI services.
> For now, inference capital markets, both onchain and off, are tiny relative to the growth of the AI industry. For onchain offerings to scale, they have to prove the advantage they bring is sustainable.
Source:
https://www.galaxy.com/insights/research/inference-capital-markets-ai-compute-gpu-futures-onchain-crypto
